summary: High‑energy 1983 show featuring monster Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain and a soaring The Other One, captured on an audience tape that benefits from a little EQ.
review: The performance is widely praised – the first set rolls nicely and the second delivers classic stretches of Scarlet/Fire, Drums‑Space and a powerful The Other One. Recording quality is decent for an audience source; listeners note some flubby mids and recommend EQ, but overall it captures the concert’s vibe well.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance with several standout jams outweighs minor tape‑quality issues; most reviewers gave 4–5 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Tape needs a bit of EQ and sounds slightly flubby, but many consider it better than a typical board mix; overall captures the concert atmosphere with acceptable clarity.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is solid and nicely paced; second set builds momentum with seamless transitions into the epic Scarlet/Fire sequence, extended Drums‑Space, and a soaring The Other One.

band_member_comments.Drums: Cool Drums/Space highlighted as a highlight of the night.
